name: Larva

attacks.name: Ravenous onslaught
attacks.tell: The larva arches back and then lunges forward with its jaws open
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge laterally at the moment of the throw or block
attacks.notes: Main larva attack; low to moderate damage

attacks.name: Frenzied Attack
attacks.tell: After the failed lunge, he shakes his body and bites repeatedly erratically.
attacks.howToAvoid: Stay away until his onslaught of bites ends
attacks.notes: Can deliver 2-3 quick bites if player stays close

description: A hostile lower-mid yard predator that patrols tunnels and damp areas, relying on quick bites and underground ambushes.
behavior: It is more active at night and often burrows passively, mimicking a grub trail until it decides to strike. When a group leaves its cave, the chase can last much longer than expected.
interactionWithPlayer: It turns hostile as soon as it detects you and quickly chains several bites once it gets close.
interactionWithCreatures: It competes with other ground creatures and rarely hesitates to join in when something enters too close to its patrol route or cave.
strategy: Its weakness to spicy and slashing is still the key. Do not chase a burrowed larva without room to dodge, because the real punishment usually comes when it surfaces right under you.
